<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>T-O Services | Fort Worth, TX</title>
<style>
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  :root {
    --navy: #0f2240;
    --blue: #1a4a8a;
    --accent: #00c2ff;
    --light: #e8f4ff;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --gray: #6b7280;
  }
  body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #1f2937; background: #fff; }

  nav {
    background: var(--navy);
    padding: 0 40px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    height: 72px; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: white; text-decoration: none; }
  .logo img { height: 48px; width: 48px; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 8px; background: white; padding: 3px; }
  .logo-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; line-height: 1.1; }
  .logo-name { font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 900; color: white; letter-spacing: -0.3px; }
  .logo-sub { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
  .nav-cta { background: var(--accent); color: var(--navy); padding: 9px 22px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; text-decoration: none; }
  .nav-cta:hover { opacity: 0.85; }

  .hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy) 0%, var(--blue) 60%, #1a6aaa 100%);
    color: white; padding: 90px 40px 80px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 50%, rgba(0,194,255,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%); }
  .hero-inner { max-width: 700px; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
  .hero-logo { width: 100px; height: 100px; object-fit: contain; background: white; border-radius: 16px; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 28px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
  .hero-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: rgba(0,194,255,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(0,194,255,0.4); color: var(--accent); padding: 5px 14px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 24px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .hero h1 { font-size: 3.2rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .hero h1 span { color: var(--accent); }
  .hero p { font-size: 1.15rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); max-width: 540px; margin: 0 auto 36px; line-height: 1.7; }
  .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 14px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn-primary { background: var(--accent); color: var(--navy); padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,194,255,0.4); }
  .btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: white; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; }

  .trust-bar { background: var(--light); border-top: 1px solid #d1e8f8; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1e8f8; padding: 18px 40px; display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 40px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .trust-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--blue); }

  .section { padding: 80px 40px; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-label { color: var(--accent); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .section-title { font-size: 2.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .section-sub { color: var(--gray); font-size: 1.05rem; max-width: 560px; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 52px; }

  .services-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 24px; }
  .service-card { background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid #e5e9f0; border-radius: 14px; padding: 32px 28px; transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s, border-color 0.25s; }
  .service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(15,34,64,0.12); border-color: var(--accent); }
  .service-icon { width: 54px; height: 54px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.6rem; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .service-card h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .service-card p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.93rem; line-height: 1.65; }
  .service-tag { display: inline-block; margin-top: 16px; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); background: var(--light); padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; }

  .how-section { background: var(--navy); color: white; padding: 80px 40px; }
  .how-inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .how-section .section-title { color: white; }
  .how-section .section-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); }
  .steps { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 32px; }
  .step-num { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent); color: var(--navy); font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.1rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .step h4 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .step p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.65; }

  .audience-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; }
  .audience-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy) 0%, var(--blue) 100%); color: white; border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px 24px; }
  .audience-card .a-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .audience-card h4 { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .audience-card p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); line-height: 1.6; }

  .cta-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent) 0%, #0094cc 100%); padding: 72px 40px; text-align: center; }
  .cta-section h2 { font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .cta-section > p { color: rgba(15,34,64,0.75); font-size: 1.05rem; margin-bottom: 36px; }
  .contact-options { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .contact-card { background: var(--navy); color: white; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px 32px; min-width: 210px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; }
  .contact-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(15,34,64,0.3); }
  .contact-card .c-icon { font-size: 1.6rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .contact-card .c-label { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 5px; }
  .contact-card .c-value { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: white; }
  .cta-note { color: rgba(15,34,64,0.65); font-size: 0.88rem; margin-top: 10px; }

  footer { background: #0a1728; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); padding: 36px 40px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; }
  .footer-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
  .footer-brand img { height: 36px; width: 36px; object-fit: contain; background: white; border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px; }
  .footer-logo { color: white; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.05rem; }
  .footer-location { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); font-size: 0.82rem; margin-top: 3px; }
  .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .footer-links a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.85rem; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
  .footer-copy { font-size: 0.82rem; }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .hero h1 { font-size: 2.1rem; }
    nav { padding: 0 20px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .section { padding: 60px 20px; }
    .trust-bar { gap: 20px; padding: 16px 20px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a href="#" class="logo">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="T-O Services Logo" />
    <div class="logo-text">
      <span class="logo-name">T-O Services</span>
      <span class="logo-sub">Fort Worth, TX</span>
    </div>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#how">How It Works</a></li>
    <li><a href="#who">Who We Serve</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Get a Quote</a>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="T-O Services" class="hero-logo" />
    <div class="hero-badge">📍 Serving Fort Worth, TX &amp; Surrounding Areas</div>
    <h1>Every Service Your Property<br><span>Needs, Handled.</span></h1>
    <p>T-O Services provides trash can set-out, junk removal, lawn mowing, and pressure washing — so your property stays clean and compliant without you lifting a finger.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary">Get a Free Quote</a>
      <a href="#services" class="btn-secondary">See Our Services</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="trust-bar">
  <div class="trust-item"> 1 Trash Can Set-Out</div>
  <div class="trust-item"> 2 Junk Removal</div>
  <div class="trust-item"> 3 Lawn Mowing</div>
  <div class="trust-item"> 4 Pressure Washing</div>
  <div class="trust-item">📍 Fort Worth, TX</div>
</div>

<section class="section" id="services">
  <div class="section-label">What We Do</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Full-Service Property Care<br>Without the Hassle</h2>
  <p class="section-sub">Whether you manage a rental remotely or run a business without staff on site every day, T-O Services keeps your property clean, tidy, and compliant.</p>
  <div class="services-grid">
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon" style="background:#e0f0ff;">🗑️</div>
      <h3>Trash Can Set-Out &amp; Return</h3>
      <p>We roll your bins to the curb before pickup and bring them back in afterward — consistently, on every scheduled collection day. Perfect for Airbnbs, businesses, and absentee owners.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Weekly / Bi-Weekly Plans</span>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon" style="background:#d1fae5;"></div>
      <h3>Lawn Mowing</h3>
      <p>Keep your property looking sharp year-round. We provide reliable mowing services for residential and commercial properties, including rentals that need regular upkeep between tenants.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Recurring &amp; One-Time</span>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon" style="background:#e0f8ff;"></div>
      <h3>Pressure Washing</h3>
      <p>Driveways, sidewalks, patios, siding — we blast away grime, mold, and buildup to restore your property's curb appeal fast. Great for turnovers and seasonal cleanups.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Residential &amp; Commercial</span>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon" style="background:#ede9fe;"></div>
      <h3>Airbnb &amp; Short-Term Rental</h3>
      <p>Keep your guest reviews spotless. We handle trash, lawn, and cleaning services coordinated around your rental calendar — no awkward surprises for guests.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Rental-Friendly Scheduling</span>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon" style="background:#fff4e6;"></div>
      <h3>Large Item &amp; Junk Removal</h3>
      <p>Old furniture, appliances, renovation debris — we haul it away fast. Great for property turnovers, full cleanouts, and anything that won't fit in a standard bin.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">On-Demand Scheduling</span>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon" style="background:#d1fae5;"></div>
      <h3>Commercial Properties</h3>
      <p>Restaurants, offices, retail — if your service day doesn't line up with staff hours, we handle trash set-out, grounds maintenance, and more so you stay compliant and clean.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Business Accounts</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="how-section" id="how">
  <div class="how-inner">
    <div class="section-label" style="color:var(--accent)">Simple Process</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Up and Running in 4 Easy Steps</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">No complicated contracts. No stress. Just reliable service that runs in the background.</p>
    <div class="steps">
      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-num">1</div>
        <h4>Request a Quote</h4>
        <p>Tell us your address, property type, and which services you need. We'll send a fast, no-obligation quote within 24 hours.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-num">2</div>
        <h4>We Set Up Your Plan</h4>
        <p>We sync with your schedule and confirm service details, access, and any special instructions for your property.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-num">3</div>
        <h4>We Handle It Every Time</h4>
        <p>Sit back and relax. Your services run on schedule — every single time — without reminders from you.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-num">4</div>
        <h4>Need Something Extra?</h4>
        <p>Just call or text us. We'll schedule junk removal, pressure washing, or any add-on service at a time that works for you.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section" id="who">
  <div class="section-label">Who We Serve</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Perfect For</h2>
  <p class="section-sub">Anyone in the Fort Worth area who needs reliable property services without being there in person.</p>
  <div class="audience-grid">
    <div class="audience-card">
      <div class="a-icon"></div>
      <h4>Airbnb &amp; VRBO Hosts</h4>
      <p>Keep your property guest-ready with trash service, lawn care, and pressure washing between turnovers.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="audience-card">
      <div class="a-icon">🏘️</div>
      <h4>Property Managers</h4>
      <p>Manage dozens of units? We scale with you and handle every service day across your entire portfolio.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="audience-card">
      <div class="a-icon"></div>
      <h4>Small Businesses</h4>
      <p>Restaurants, salons, shops — we work around your hours so trash days and grounds upkeep are never a headache.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="audience-card">
      <div class="a-icon"></div>
      <h4>Elderly &amp; Mobility-Limited</h4>
      <p>Affordable trash set-out, lawn mowing, and more for individuals who need a dependable helping hand.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="cta-section" id="contact">
  <h2>Ready to Take These Tasks<br>Off Your Plate?</h2>
  <p>Reach out today for a free, no-obligation quote. Proudly serving Fort Worth, TX and the surrounding DFW area.</p>
  <div class="contact-options">
    <a href="tel:8179358603" class="contact-card">
      <div class="c-icon">📞</div>
      <div class="c-label">Call or Text</div>
      <div class="c-value">(817) 935-8603</div>
    </a>
    <a href="mailto:TOSALESFW@OUTLOOK.COM" class="contact-card">
      <div class="c-icon">✉️</div>
      <div class="c-label">Email Us</div>
      <div class="c-value">TOSALESFW@Outlook.com</div>
    </a>
  </div>
  <p class="cta-note">📍 Proudly serving Fort Worth, TX and the surrounding DFW area</p>
</section>

<footer>
  <div>
    <div class="footer-brand">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="T-O Services" />
      <div>
        <div class="footer-logo">T-O Services</div>
        <div class="footer-location">📍 Fort Worth, TX</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="#services">Services</a>
    <a href="#how">How It Works</a>
    <a href="#who">Who We Serve</a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-copy">© 2026 T-O Services. All rights reserved.</div>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
